approach: Create a soda-simple fixture directory containing all SODA-schema phase files; register a conftest fixture; add integration tests to test_adapters.py

tasks.description: Create tests/fixtures/sessions/soda-simple/ with meta.json and events.jsonl
tasks.done_when: meta.json and events.jsonl exist and are valid JSON/JSONL

tasks.description: Create SODA-schema phase files: triage, plan, implement, verify, review
tasks.done_when: All phase files validate against the SODA JSON schemas

tasks.description: Add soda_simple_dir fixture to conftest.py and integration tests to test_adapters.py

commands: uv run pytest tests/test_adapters.py -v -k soda -m 'not slow'
